title: Grass Overlay
description: Overgrown edges only for grass and moss!
body:
This unique overlay resource pack affects only grass and moss blocks, because only grass and moss can grow in real life to adjacent blocks! Only floors have been changed, walls are still intact.

# 

This pack uses only subtle overhang to maximize the uncovered portion of neighbouring blocks.
Grass, moss and pale moss blocks are extended into the following blocks:

- dirt path, farmland, dirt, mud, clay, sand, gravel, podzol, mycelium, nylium
- natural stones (andesite, basalt, blackstone, calcite, deepslate, diorite, granite, tuff, stone, end stone, cobblestone)
- wood logs and planks
- terracotta
- concrete, concrete powder
- dead coral

I have made this pack because the majority of the connected block and overlay resource packes are changing too many things causing unnecessary visual glithes in creative builds.
# 
Please check out my other pack, [Stone Brick Overlay](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stone-brick-overlay): in a similar fashion it will upgrade only the stone brick walls.

If you have any suggestions please let me know on my discord channel.
# 
Requires Optifine, or Continuity mod. Does not work in vanilla Minecraft.
